## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Understory and GrowthX for mutual benefit in content creation, website design, and event planning.](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to help Understory with website redesign, content strategy, and SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Understory to assist GrowthX with outbound marketing, lead nurturing, and paid media strategies](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Plan joint event and workshop during Clay Conference week in September](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore partnership opportunities for cross-referrals and combined service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current State of GrowthX Marketing

  - [Focus on creating valuable content and gating it to generate leads](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Hosting workshops and events to build audience and warm leads](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Need help with programs to nurture and convert audience into pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Current follow-up process after workshops is minimal, mostly generic emails](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Understory's Capabilities and Needs

  - [Expertise in outbound marketing, paid media, and marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Website and content strategy need significant improvement](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
  - [Looking to increase organic traffic and lead generation through content](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Current website gets \~500 visits/month, aiming for 30,000-50,000 like competitors](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

### Proposed Collaboration

  - [GrowthX to redesign Understory's website and develop content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Understory to help with outbound marketing, lead nurturing, and paid media for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential for revenue sharing or service exchange to benefit both companies](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Joint workshop on converting organic traffic into leads/customers](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Event Planning for September

  - [Co-host social event during Clay Conference week (Sept 11+)](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Target audience: 30-40 ideal customer personas (e.g., CROs, CMOs from SaaS companies)](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
  - [Focus on networking and relationship-building rather than formal presentations](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)
  - [Potentially use as exclusive offer for podcast appearance promotion](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2664.0)

### Partnership Opportunities

  - [Cross-referrals for complementary services](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2869.0)
  - [Combined offering: GrowthX for top-of-funnel content strategy, Understory for conversion and outbound](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
  - [Explore co-marketing initiatives like joint workshops and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send statement of work for Understory website and content project](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2285.0)
  - [Understory to share intake form detailing their needs from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2312.0)
  - [Schedule date for joint workshop before Clay Conference](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Plan details for September networking event in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2922.0)
  - [Explore podcast appearance opportunity for Understory team](https://fathom.video/share/s_Sv-1Z5sa6CTUmgx2s3Zumy9fHcaJDs?tab=summary&timestamp=2664.0)
